To: Board of Directors, ELT, IR, and Treasury – Palisade HealthBank, Inc.
From: Dr. Maya Ellison, Chief Compliance Officer
Date: July 8
Re: Reg FD/Rule 10b-5 controls for upcoming interactions and data handling

Our quiet period runs from 6/15 until the earnings press release scheduled 7/23 at 7:30 a.m. ET; a Form 8‑K (Item 2.02) will be furnished concurrently pursuant to Reg FD.
Until that time, the following are material nonpublic: preliminary Q2 HSA deposit growth, early July pilot migration results showing ~11% uplift, and the draft share repurchase authorization on the Board’s 7/18 agenda.
Selective disclosure risk: one-on-one call with Mr. Hal Brenner of Larkstone Analytics on 7/10—IR may discuss our 5/6 Form 10‑Q and the 6/5 press release announcing a non‑binding MOU with Sunfield Clinic Network, but must avoid intra‑quarter trends, implied guidance, and “whisper” numbers.
Patient-level claims or enrollment data constitute PII/PHI; only de‑identified, aggregated metrics (state‑level, >90 days stale) may be shared externally, and any Nonpublic Personal Information under GLBA remains within the bank subsidiary firewall.
The payer contract redlines with Meadowrise Health Plan include a 12% utilization rebate trigger; this remains under NDA in the diligence room and is MNPI until executed and publicly announced.
Treasury and Finance personnel in the blackout must pre‑clear any trades under our Insider Trading Policy; 10b5‑1 plans remain permissible if adopted outside blackout windows and in good faith.
It is acceptable to reference the publicly posted 2021 CSR report and last year’s care quality metrics, which are stale and non‑material.
Operational note: the cafeteria hours at the Rivergate campus changed last week; that update is not material for securities law purposes.
Do not email any patient story or employee record to external parties; route such requests to Ms. Lara Quinn (privacy) at privacy@palisadehb.com.
Analysts and investors who request “color” on July gross additions should be directed to the press release timing; any inadvertent selective disclosure triggers an immediate broadly disseminated update via our newsroom and concurrent 8‑K.
For banking customers, account‑level servicing issues (e.g., ACH delay complaints) are confidential customer information and not to be discussed on earnings prep calls.
Questions or pre‑clearance: compliance@palisadehb.com or ext. 4429; legal contact: Mr. Jerome Vale, Deputy GC.
